author: y4rr
content:
Pass 4 audit complete — 22 parallel Sonnet subagents reported (one per crate).

## Workspace totals

317 findings across 22 crates × 6 buckets.

| Bucket            | Count | Definition                                              |
|-------------------|-------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| STUB              | 36    | Reachable pub fn returns placeholder/no-op/Err          |
| GPU_CPU_MISMATCH  | 37    | Silent CPU readback / device-divergent paths            |
| DOC_DRIFT         | 64    | Docstring claims X, impl does Y (verbatim quoted)       |
| ARCH_SMELL        | 71    | Circular dep, abstraction leak, dead pub item           |
| PERF_OBVIOUS      | 57    | Clear hot-path footgun, static-evidence only            |
| TEST_INTEGRITY    | 52    | Tests don't exercise the contract                       |
| **TOTAL**         | **317** |                                                        |

## Per-crate scorecard

| Crate                      | STUB | GPU_CPU | DOC | ARCH | PERF | TEST | Total |
|----------------------------|------|---------|-----|------|------|------|-------|
| ferrotorch-mps             | 8    | 4       | 4   | 3    | 4    | 4    | **27** |
| ferrotorch-vision          | 4    | 6       | 4   | 4    | 5    | 2    | **25** |
| ferrotorch (umbrella)      | 0    | 3       | 5   | 4    | 3    | 4    | **19** |
| ferrotorch-distributions   | 1    | 5       | 3   | 4    | 3    | 3    | **19** |
| ferrotorch-train           | 3    | 3       | 3   | 3    | 3    | 2    | **17** |
| ferrotorch-data            | 1    | 3       | 3   | 3    | 3    | 3    | **16** |
| ferrotorch-optim           | 1    | 4       | 2   | 3    | 4    | 1    | **15** |
| ferrotorch-profiler        | 1    | 2       | 3   | 4    | 3    | 2    | **15** |
| ferrotorch-gpu             | 2    | 1       | 3   | 3    | 2    | 3    | **14** |
| ferrotorch-jit             | 3    | 2       | 2   | 3    | 2    | 2    | **14** |
| ferrotorch-distributed     | 3    | 0       | 3   | 3    | 3    | 2    | **14** |
| ferrotorch-hub             | 4    | 0       | 2   | 3    | 2    | 3    | **14** |
| ferrotorch-llama           | 1    | 2       | 3   | 2    | 3    | 2    | **13** |
| ferrotorch-ml              | 1    | 0       | 3   | 4    | 3    | 3    | **14** |
| ferrotorch-serialize       | 0    | 0       | 3   | 4    | 3    | 2    | **12** |
| ferrotorch-core            | 2    | 0       | 2   | 4    | 1    | 2    | **11** |
| ferrotorch-tokenize        | 1    | 0       | 3   | 3    | 2    | 2    | **11** |
| ferrotorch-xpu             | 0    | 0       | 3   | 2    | 2    | 3    | **10** |
| ferrotorch-jit-script      | 0    | 0       | 3   | 2    | 1    | 3    |  **9** |
| ferrotorch-cubecl          | 0    | 0       | 1   | 2    | 3    | 2    |  **8** |
| ferrotorch-nn-derive       | 0    | n/a     | 2   | 3    | 1    | 2    |  **8** |
| ferrotorch-nn              | 0    | 2       | 1   | 1    | 1    | 0    |  **5** |

Worst-in-class: ferrotorch-mps (27, with 8 silent stubs) and ferrotorch-vision (25, with 4 stubs + 6 GPU/CPU mismatches).

## Highest-severity findings (P0 — silent wrong output)

1. **ferrotorch-vision** SSD300 `Module::forward` returns zeros silently (registered in pretrained registry).
2. **ferrotorch-mps** `MpsDevice::new` + `mps_device_count` always error → entire MPS surface unusable; `neg_f32`, `gelu_f32`, `dropout_f32`, etc. (8 STUBs).
3. **ferrotorch-mps** softmax / sum kernels: pow-2 reduction bug.
4. **ferrotorch-distributed** `gloo` / `mpi` / `ucc` skeleton backends `pub use`d from crate root.
5. **ferrotorch-tokenize** `strftime_now` hardcoded `""` → Llama-3.1 chat templates render empty dates.
6. **ferrotorch-train** `checkpoint_sequential` is a straight-through forward dressed up as gradient checkpointing (doc lies).
7. **ferrotorch-jit** `fusion.rs::apply_fused` always returns CPU-storage output regardless of input device.
8. **ferrotorch-distributions** `Transform` impls + `TransformedDistribution::log_prob` lose CUDA placement entirely (5 sites).
9. **ferrotorch-optim** Muon / KFAC / LBFGS / SparseAdam silently round-trip CUDA params through host on every step.
10. **ferrotorch-core** `cross()` accepts `dim` parameter and silently ignores it.

## Recommended fix-phase ordering

Mirroring the #1015 → 16 audit-fix phases pattern, Pass 4 spawns Pass 5.A through Pass 5.G (~31 fix-phase issues filed under #982).

**Pass 5.A — Silent stubs in user-facing API (P0, ~4 phases):**
- 5A.1 vision SSD300 silent zero-stub forward
- 5A.2 mps MpsDevice + 8 op STUBs (Apple-silicon inference blocker)
- 5A.3 mps softmax pow-2 reduction GPU kernel bug
- 5A.4 distributed gloo/mpi/ucc skeleton backends publicly re-exported

**Pass 5.B — Silent CPU demotion of GPU work (P1, ~5 phases):**
- 5B.1 distributions transforms.rs CPU readback (5 sites)
- 5B.2 train clip_grad_norm_/clip_grad_value_/EmaCallback CPU readback
- 5B.3 optim Muon/KFAC/LBFGS/SparseAdam CPU round-trip
- 5B.4 jit fusion.rs apply_fused CPU-output silent demote
- 5B.5 data transforms Normalize/RandomCrop/RandomHorizontalFlip CPU readback

**Pass 5.C — Documented stubs / contract lies (P2, ~6 phases):**
- 5C.1 train checkpoint_sequential straight-through (lies about RNG save + recompute boundary)
- 5C.2 distributions TransformedDistribution::entropy not-implemented for general case
- 5C.3 jit AotCompiledModule::forward_with_ctx + GraphSegment::Eager + InductorBackend silent fallback
- 5C.4 tokenize strftime_now hardcoded ""
- 5C.5 core cross() ignores dim; full_meta ignores _value
- 5C.6 llama HQQ deferred without anchor; data ToTensor identity-only; profiler with_stack doc/impl mismatch

**Pass 5.D — Test integrity (P3, ~5 phases):**
- 5D.1 ml 39 perfect-prediction tautologies in src/metrics.rs::tests
- 5D.2 ferrotorch (umbrella) pythia_real missing #[ignore]; validate_vs_pytorch zero assertions
- 5D.3 train Learner LossFn returns pred unchanged across 8 tests
- 5D.4 data fencepost loops without matched-count guard (28 sites)
- 5D.5 cuda_timing tests silently skip on non-CUDA hosts

**Pass 5.E — Architecture refactors (P4, ~4 phases):**
- 5E.1 distributions consolidate 6 lgamma/digamma impls into special_fns.rs
- 5E.2 llama grammar/* (4097 LoC, 53% of crate) → split into ferrotorch-grammar
- 5E.3 data MultiWorkerIter → use crossbeam/rayon primitives
- 5E.4 optim string-keyed state → typed key

**Pass 5.F — Doc surface alignment (P5, ~2 phases):**
- 5F.1 README/lib.rs API surface drift across crates (umbrella, hub, data, train, distributions, profiler)
- 5F.2 distributions kl.rs supported-pairs table stale (lists 6, registers 11)

**Pass 5.G — Perf footguns (P6, ~5 phases):**
- 5G.1 optim per-step Vec<f64> heap alloc (gigabytes for 7B-param non-foreach optimizers)
- 5G.2 data WeightedRandomSampler O(N²) + Fisher-Yates modulo bias
- 5G.3 serialize sequential shard download / whole-file SHA before stream
- 5G.4 jit autotune.rs O(inputs × values) cache key rebuild on every lookup
- 5G.5 llama beam_search / spec_decode K+1 forwards per step (no KV-cache)

## Honest reporting

- Confidence: HIGH for 8 of 22 reports (full-file reads), MED-HIGH for 14 (top-3-files + grep + skim).
- All 22 reports cite file:line for findings.
- 0 cargo runs (per Pass 4 charter — static only).
- 0 issues filed by subagents (per charter — architect aggregates and files).
- Closed-by-#1015 signatures excluded by judgment in each subagent prompt; no overlap detected on spot-check.

Next architect action: file the 31 fix-phase issues, then dispatch Pass 5.A.1.
